slides.title: After School Routine for Kids
slides.body: A simple daily structure that ends screen time battles — before they start.

slides.title: Decompress First
slides.body: Give kids 15–20 minutes to unwind before anything else. Snack, play, talk. Then the afternoon begins.

slides.title: Homework Before Screens
slides.body: When effort comes before reward, kids stop fighting it. The routine does the reminding for you.

slides.title: Set a Screen Time Window
slides.body: Define when it starts and when it ends. Kids stop asking "how much longer?" because they already know.

slides.title: Make the Routine Visible
slides.body: A visual checklist removes the need for reminders. Kids check their own progress and feel proud of it.

slides.title: Screen Time Comes Last
slides.body: When screens are the final thing before dinner, they become a natural ending — not an interruption.

caption:
The after-school hours don't have to be a battle 😤

Here's a simple routine that helps kids transition from school to screen time naturally — every single day 👇

Save this for the next time they walk through the door asking for the iPad 📱

#afterschool #kidsroutine #screentimetips #parentingtips #familyroutine
